programme.desc: Marco's clown plans get nixed, and he's forced to don the rainbow wig; his overacting in the bedroom turns Vicki off; Mia gets home to find Luke watching dog videos; Simon and JP enjoy the view from their bedroom window.

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Dead Reckoning Part One

programme.title: Anatomy of a Fall

programme.title: The Iron Claw
programme.desc: The true story of the Von Erich brothers, who, through tragedy and triumph, under the shadow of their domineering father and coach, seek epic immortality on the biggest stage in sports.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters

programme.title: Amish Affair
